api_key_required.description: Indicates whether an API key is required for the method; must be true or false.

authorization.description: Specifies the type of authorization for the API method, such as NONE, AWS_IAM, or a custom authorizer.

authorization_scopes.description: Specifies the authorization scopes required for the method, applicable only when using a Cognito user pool authorizer.

authorizer_id.description: Specifies the ID of the authorizer to use for the method, required if authorization type is set to "CUSTOM".

http_method.description: Specifies the HTTP method type (e.g., GET, POST, PUT) for the API Gateway method; must be valid according to the API Gateway standards.

operation_name.description: Specifies the name of the operation for the API Gateway method, used for identifying the method in logs and monitoring.

request_models.description: Defines the mapping of request payloads to models for different content types in the API Gateway method; must include valid content type keys and model names.

request_parameters.description: Defines the request parameters required by the method, with keys as parameter names and values as Boolean indicating whether the parameter is required.

request_validator_id.description: Specifies the ID of the request validator to use for validating request parameters and body.

resource_id.description: ID of the associated API Gateway resource that this method applies to.

rest_api_id.description: Specifies the ID of the associated API Gateway REST API.
